evals.prompt: Review my project plans. I have 4 documents: 1-product.md (features), 2-decision.md (architecture choices), 3-plan.md (technical plan), and 4-build.md (implementation steps). Intern/TermFlow/doc/2-decision.md /Users/jgbae/Documents/3. Study/2026-1 Spring/7. Intern/TermFlow/doc/3-plan.md /Users/jgbae/Documents/3. Study/2026-1 Spring/7. Intern/TermFlow/doc/4-build.md
evals.expected_output: A comprehensive senior architect review with: consistency checks across all 4 docs, risk assessment by component, identification of any gaps or contradictions, actionable recommendations, and a clear GO/CAUTION/HOLD verdict with reasoning

evals.prompt: I'm concerned about the architecture doc and build steps alignment. Can you specifically check: (1) Do the phases in 3-plan.md match the steps in 4-build.md? (2) Are there any technology decisions from 2-decision.md that aren't properly reflected in the later docs? Files: /Users/jgbae/Documents/3. Study/2026-1 Spring/7. Intern/TermFlow/doc/2-decision.md /Users/jgbae/Documents/3. Study/2026-1 Spring/7. Intern/TermFlow/doc/3-plan.md /Users/jgbae/Documents/3. Study/2026-1 Spring/7. Intern/TermFlow/doc/4-build.md
evals.expected_output: Detailed consistency check between architecture decisions, plan phases, and build steps. Specific callouts of any misalignment (e.g., if doc 2 chose Ollama but doc 4 still references Claude API key setup). Clear verdict on whether the later docs properly implement the decisions made in doc 2.

evals.prompt: Before I spend 36 hours coding, give me a risk assessment. What are the top 3 things that could derail this project? What's the riskiest component? What do I need to be ready for? Files: /Users/jgbae/Documents/3. Study/2026-1 Spring/7. Intern/TermFlow/doc/3-plan.md /Users/jgbae/Documents/3. Study/2026-1 Spring/7. Intern/TermFlow/doc/4-build.md
